description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named continuous-integration that runs on every push and pull request. The workflow should have three jobs: linux-os, windows-os, and macOS, each running on a different operating system. The linux-os job should update APT, install dependencies, checkout repositories, get dependencies for AppImage, build AppImage, and upload artifacts. The windows-os job should define variables, download and install tools, setup Python, clone repositories, configure and build, and upload artifacts with different configurations for various platforms. The macOS and iOS-Simulator jobs should checkout repositories, clone dependencies, build, and upload artifacts.
